decision.summary: No new action: the daily bearish idea has already effectively played out, and the only clean remaining live position is the weekly 80k reach.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77750.12, still well below the session high with shorts dominant and open interest flat, so the intraday bearish move has already largely happened. That is reflected in the board: the daily 77k dip now sits at roughly 99.95%, meaning the same-day downside thesis is already effectively resolved and no longer offers a fresh entry. The account snapshot no longer shows that daily as an active open position, so the live book is now just the weekly 80k reach around 40.5%, plus the old weekly 72k dip as a discarded legacy position. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. For new entries, the nearby downside dailies are either too stretched or already largely done, while the nearest upside daily, 79k reach, is only about 15.5% and would be a weak late-session countertrend chase with just 6 hours left to expiry. On the weekly side, the next upside strike, 82k reach, remains only about 12.5%, too weak to justify forcing a secondary weekly entry. The correct action is to hold the live weekly 80k reach and avoid opening anything new into a board where the daily edge has already passed.
